name: Tasty Black-Eyed Pea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 1.5 cups of water to a boil.
2. Add the frozen black-eyed peas, pimientos, liquid smoke, chopped onion, vinegar, and garlic to the boiling water.
3. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 45 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and let cool. Transfer to a bowl and refrigerate for at least 6-8 hours.
5. In a large salad bowl, combine the spinach leaves, cooked black-eyed peas (chilled), chopped red bell pepper, grated Monterey Jack cheese, black pepper, red pepper flakes, sliced mushrooms, minced garlic, and olive oil.
6. Mix well and cover before refrigerating for an additional hour or more.
7. Serve chilled.
